symptoms.symptom_name: Palpitations / pounding racing chest with breathlessness (patient-reported)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: secondary / vicarious traumatic stress with autonomic hyperarousal
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Adrenergic surge produces palpitations and hyperventilation; symptom spikes on media contact.
New chest symptoms in an adult require ECG/troponin to exclude; cannot be done via telehealth.
Acute dyspnoea with tachycardia is compatible with PE and needs objective exclusion.

symptoms.symptom_name: No crushing/radiating exertional chest pain (patient-reported pertinent negative)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Lowers pre-test probability but self-report does NOT exclude ACS remotely; an ECG is still required.

symptoms.symptom_name: 48 hours of complete insomnia with intrusive imagery and nightmares of the footage

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: secondary / vicarious traumatic stress with autonomic hyperarousal
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Intrusive re-experiencing and insomnia after saturating traumatic-media exposure are core features of secondary traumatic stress.

symptoms.symptom_name: Compulsion to keep watching distressing footage (bearing witness)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: secondary / vicarious traumatic stress with autonomic hyperarousal
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Compulsive continued exposure is a recognised perpetuating behaviour in vicarious trauma.

symptoms.symptom_name: Helplessness, survivor-type guilt and hopelessness (SI risk background)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: secondary / vicarious traumatic stress with autonomic hyperarousal
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Affective symptoms of vicarious trauma; also flags the mandatory suicide-risk screen.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: secondary / vicarious traumatic stress with autonomic hyperarousal
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective tachycardia consistent with adrenergic surge; a self-read wearable estimate is offered in 01 but a clinical measurement is sealed.
Tachycardia is non-specific and does not discriminate the mimic.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: secondary / vicarious traumatic stress with autonomic hyperarousal
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Elevated BP fits sympathetic overdrive; not obtainable without a device in this encounter.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachypnoea RR 24 with clear breath sounds, no wheeze (auscultation)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: secondary / vicarious traumatic stress with autonomic hyperarousal
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clear lung fields point to hyperventilation rather than a primary respiratory pathology — but auscultation is clinician-only and sealed.
Normal oximetry lowers PE probability but is not obtainable remotely here and does not exclude PE alone.
Reassuring but non-diagnostic; ACS is excluded by ECG/troponin, not auscultation.

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: ACS cannot be excluded; telehealth cannot obtain this, mandating in-person escalation.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The definitive first-line test to exclude ACS — unavailable via telehealth, so escalation is required.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: secondary / vicarious traumatic stress with autonomic hyperarousal
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Media trigger + intrusive re-experiencing + compulsive exposure + adrenergic symptoms together point to secondary traumatic stress, but do not by themselves exclude the cardiorespiratory mimic.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Required to exclude acute coronary syndrome; cannot be obtained via telehealth, so the AI Doctor arranges urgent same-day in-person assessment rather than ordering it remotely.
Auscultation, measured vitals and SpO2 exclude a primary respiratory cause and inform PE risk — all clinician-only.
